ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Interface IBcm


  • public interface IBcm
    车身

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int AUTO_CLOSE_WINDOW_RAINY
      rain auto close windows 下雨自动关窗，原ID为BCM_FUNC_AUTO_CLOSE_WINDOW_RAINY ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 17:49:20
      static int AUTO_REAR_WIPING
      Automatically turn on the rear wiper 自动开启后雨刮，开启后判断两个条件：1、倒车，2、前雨刮开启；两个都满足则开启后雨刮，原ID：SETTING_FUNC_AUTO_REAR_WIPING ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 11:27:36
      static int CHILD_SAFETY_LOCK
      Deprecated. 
      using VehiclePropertyIds#DOOR_CHILD_LOCK_ENABLED instead on Android 14 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int CUSTOM_KEY
      custom key navigation，setting custom key service default 自定义按键，原ID为BCM_FUNC_CUSTOM_KEY ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IBcm.CustomKeyType property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 18:31:32
      static int LIGHT_ATMOSPHERE_LAMPS
      open/close Atmosphere lamps 氛围灯开关，原ID为BCM_FUNC_LIGHT_ATMOSPHERE_LAMPS ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 09:49:27
      static int LIGHT_FRONT_FOG_LAMPS
      Deprecated. 
      using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#FRONT_FOG_LIGHTS_STATE instead on android-13 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int LOCK_AUTO_CLOSE_WINDOW
      Setting auto close window when lock 锁车自动关窗设置,原ID为SETTING_FUNC_LOCK_AUTO_CLOSE_WINDOW ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 17:48:18
      static int MIRROR_AUTO_FOLDING
      Deprecated. 
      使用原生ID: MIRROR_AUTO_FOLD_ENABLED --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int PAB_SWITCH
      Passenger Airbag on off 1.
      static int PBC_EPB_SWITCH
      Deprecated. 
      using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#PARKING_BRAKE_ON instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int POWER_ONOFF
      Deprecated. 
      使用 #POWER_ON和#POWER_OFF代替 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int REAR_MIRROR_ADJUST
      Request to adjust the left/right/both exterior rear mirrors<br>Left mirror use with VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_LEFT<br>Right mirror use with VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_RIGHT<br>Both mirror use with VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_LEFT | VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_RIGHT<br> 激活后视镜调节，原ID为BCM_FUNC_REAR_MIRROR_ADJUST ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_MIRROR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:10:51
      static int TRAILER_PRESENT
      Deprecated. 
      在APILevel-33时，使用同名原生接口android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#TRAILER_PRESENT --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int VEHICLE_FACTORY_RESET
      Request car to factory reset 整车恢复出厂设置 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:53:20
      static int VEHICLE_FACTORY_RESET_STATUS
      Restore the factory result 整车恢复出厂设置状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IBcm.FactoryResetStatus property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:56:48
      static int WINDSCREEN_SERVICE_POSITION
      to activate wiper service position for windscreen through a menu 雨刮维修位置 / 挡风玻璃雨刮擦拭位置，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_WINDSCREEN_SERVICE_POSITION ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_WINDOW ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 17:56:21

    • Field Detail

      • POWER_ONOFF

        @Deprecated
static final int POWER_ONOFF
        Deprecated. 使用 #POWER_ON和#POWER_OFF代替 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
        Power ON and Power OFF request to VMM 启动/关闭车 (类 一键启动)，车辆下电，原ID为BCM_FUNC_POWER_ONOFF
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Boolean property type
        wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 14:56:22

      • REAR_MIRROR_ADJUST

        static final int REAR_MIRROR_ADJUST
        Request to adjust the left/right/both exterior rear mirrors<br>Left mirror use with VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_LEFT<br>Right mirror use with VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_RIGHT<br>Both mirror use with VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_LEFT | VehicleAreaMirror#MIRROR_DRIVER_RIGHT<br> 激活后视镜调节，原ID为BCM_FUNC_REAR_MIRROR_ADJUST

        static final int AUTO_REAR_WIPING

        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PAB_SWITCH

        static final int PAB_SWITCH
        Passenger Airbag on off 1. Validity: can only be set in P gear, and cannot be set or adjusted in driving gears such as D and R. 2. The signal value is of boolean type, set to true to enable the passenger airbag, set to false to disable the passenger airbag. 乘客安全气囊使能开关 1、有效性: 仅在P挡位可以进行设置,在D挡位和R挡位等行车挡位不能进行设置和调整。 2、信号值为boolean类型,设置为true,启用副驾安全气囊,设置false,禁用副驾安全气囊。
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Boolean property type
        deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-09-05 15:37:01
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • TRAILER_PRESENT

        @Deprecated
static final int TRAILER_PRESENT
        Deprecated. 在APILevel-33时，使用同名原生接口android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#TRAILER_PRESENT --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
        [Same name as native interface]Indicates if there is a trailer present or not.<br/><p>Returns the trailer state of the car. 【与原生接口同名】指示是否有拖车<br/><p>返回汽车的拖车状态。
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • IBcm.TrailerState property type
        deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-11-27 09:57:13
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values
